ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "num_runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs in the simulation */,
  "num_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in each run */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the simulation */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number in the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the run */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number in the run */,
  "gain_outcome" REAL /* Gain outcome for the trial */,
  "loss_outcome" REAL /* Loss outcome for the trial */,
  "gain_utility" REAL /* Gain utility for the trial */,
  "loss_utility" REAL /* Loss utility for the trial */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict associated with the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., Conflict, Non-Conflict) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was introduced */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was resolved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conflict */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the conflict */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of incentive (e.g., Monetary, Non-Monetary) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the incentive was introduced */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the incentive was removed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the incentive */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the incentive */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the decision belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the decision */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the participant (e.g., Bet, Quit) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the decision (e.g., Win, Lose) */,
  "chip" REAL /* Chip count after the decision */,
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incentive for the decision */,
  "decision_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the decision */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the decision */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_decisions_incentive_id FOREIGN KEY ("incentive_id") REFERENCES incentives ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_decisions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_decisions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., Participant, Researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)
